Package
Description
com.nib.supernaut.api
Public API interfaces exposing Supernaut services over Spring Cloud Functions.
com.nib.supernaut.ctg
Supernaut CTG API
  • Classes in com.nib.supernaut.ctg used by com.nib.supernaut.api
    Class
    Description
    TransactionGatewayRequest
    Represents a request sent to the CICS Transaction Gateway (CTG).
    TransactionGatewayResponse
    Represents the response returned by the Transaction Gateway.

    Represents an ECI (External Call Interface) request for communicating with a CICS gateway.
